name: multi-query
description: Batch-query multiple files matching a glob pattern: grep content, extract JSON keys, list JSON keys, or list paths, replacing iterative for-loop chains.

parameters.name: glob_pattern
parameters.description: Glob pattern matching files/dirs to query (e.g., /app/packages/*/package.json)

parameters.name: --cd
parameters.description: Change to directory before resolving glob

parameters.name: --grep
parameters.description: Grep for pattern in each matched file's content

parameters.name: --json-key
parameters.description: Extract dot-separated JSON key from each file

parameters.name: --json-keys
parameters.description: List top-level JSON keys from each file

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses for-pkg-in-glob loops with inline grep, JSON extraction, or listing into one step, saving 1-2 agent steps per batch query and reducing command length.
